display.purpose: Page titles, and any large standalone figure (spend total, retention days).

label.purpose: Form labels, button text, nav items.

data.purpose: Costs, timestamps, run IDs, model names — tabular/numeric only.

shadows.name: float
shadows.purpose: Toasts and popovers only — anything floating above document flow via position: fixed.

shadows.name: cta
shadows.purpose: The sidebar's Run Now button only — the one named exception to shadows-only-on-floating-elements.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease-out-quart for hover/focus state transitions, 150ms.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one primary action on a view (Run Now, Approve, Save).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #C0532B; color: #FBF2E4; padding: 16px 18px; border-radius: 18px; border: none; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #A8431F; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C0532B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary action — edit, regenerate, cancel. The default button everywhere that isn't the one primary action.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #43301F; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #F3E7D0; border-color: #E5D2AF; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #C0532B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Danger Button
components.description: Discard, only. Never filled — a filled red button reads as an alarm this product doesn't need to sound.
components.css: .ds-btn-danger { background: transparent; color: #A6503B; padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 14px; border: 1px solid transparent; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-danger:hover { background: rgba(166, 80, 59, 0.12); } .ds-btn-danger:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #A6503B; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Content Card
components.description: The default container for any discrete content block — a draft post, a provider row, a settings section, an admin table.
components.html:
Draft 1 of 3

Sample drafted post text goes here, wrapping naturally across a few lines to show the reading measure.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FAF3E5; border-radius: 18px; padding: 16px 24px; } .ds-card-meta { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.01em; color: #8A7256; margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #43301F; margin: 0; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field — API keys, source URLs, settings values.
components.css: .ds-input { background: #FDF8EE; color: #43301F; border: 1px solid #E5D2AF; border-radius: 14px; padding: 10px 14px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; width: 100%; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8A7256; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #C0532B; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(192, 83, 43, 0.20); }

components.name: Id / Status Chip
components.description: A draft's numeric id, and the 'new/unreviewed' nav badge — the system's one pill-chip language, used freely across the interface.
components.css: .ds-badge-accent { display: inline-block; background: #E8CFA9; color: #6E4E28; padding: 5px 11px; border-radius: 999px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 500; }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Persistent left sidebar — brand, Run Now, nav items with a filled-pill active state, footer stat strip. Replaces the previous system's single-row top bar.
components.html: ReviewAPI ConfigSettingsCostsAdmin
components.css: .ds-sidebar-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 14px; border-radius: 18px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 500; color: #6E4E28; text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: #F3E7D0; } .ds-nav-item-active { background: #43301F; color: #FBF2E4; }

narrative.overview: A warm studio desk in daylight — sand walls, cream paper, one terracotta accent that shows up everywhere the product wants your attention. Replaces the previous 'Study Lamp' system (a near-black, one-lit-thing reading room) after the self-hoster reviewing this tool asked for something warmer, rounder, and more family-friendly. Warmth is structural, not an accent choice: the background itself is sand, every content block earns a soft cream card, and one terracotta hue carries navigation, primary actions, and the chip/badge language throughout.
keyCharacteristics: Sand background, cream card surfaces — warmth lives in the room itself, not just accents.
One terracotta hue used liberally: navigation, primary actions, chips, badges.
Cards are the default content container — sections, rows, and table wrappers all use them.
Heavy, consistent rounding (14-28px, plus true pills) — playful, never sharp.
A persistent left sidebar carries navigation, Run Now, and at-a-glance status.

rules.name: The Warm Surface Rule
rules.body: Warmth lives in the background itself, not just ink and accent. bg is deliberately sand, not zero-chroma.

rules.name: The Warm Consistency Rule
rules.body: Terracotta is the system's one interactive color, used consistently wherever something is active or actionable — no per-screen budget.

rules.name: The Two-Voice Rule
rules.body: Exactly two sans-serif voices: Bricolage Grotesque for structure/hierarchy, Instrument Sans for everything read or interacted with. A third sans-serif, or either voice appearing in the other's role, is drift.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule (mostly preserved)
rules.body: A card sits at rest with zero shadow. The sidebar's Run Now button is the one named exception, earning a colored CTA shadow as a hierarchy signal.

rules.name: The Cards-Are-Default Rule
rules.body: Every genuinely discrete content block (a provider, a draft, a table row, a settings section) sits on a card by default. In-progress add/edit mini-forms and sidebar nav items are the narrow exceptions.

dos: Do keep bg warm and sand-toned — the background carrying warmth is the point now.
Do wrap genuinely discrete content in a card by default.
Do use terracotta consistently for every active/primary signal.
Do cap draft/body text at a comfortable reading measure.
Do respect prefers-reduced-motion on every transition.
donts: Don't introduce a shadow on an ordinary at-rest card — the CTA button is the one named exception.
Don't use a filled red button for Discard.
Don't add a gradient anywhere, or glassmorphism/backdrop-blur.
Don't introduce a third sans-serif alongside Bricolage Grotesque and Instrument Sans.
Don't use the uppercase-tracked label style outside Admin's table headers.
